A Sacred Invitation

You Are Cordially
Invited

With hearts overflowing with gratitude to Allah ﷻ, and with great joy, our families invite you to witness the blessed nikah of Muskan and Asad — two souls united by divine decree. Your presence, your laughter, and your duas are the greatest honour you could bestow upon this union.

مسکن
Muskan
&
اسد
Asad
وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً
"And of His signs is that He created for you from yourselves mates — that you may find tranquillity in them, and He placed between you affection and mercy."
Al-Qur'an · Surah Ar-Rum · 30:21

Your Presence is
Our Greatest Gift
"We are humbled that you would take time from your lives to witness this blessed occasion. Your laughter, your embrace, your duas — there is no gift more precious."
بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكُمَا وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكُمَا وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
"May Allah bless you both, and join you together in goodness."
